title: Process Management (Windows)
description: Perintah untuk mengelola proses, task, dan performa sistem di Windows.

commands.name: tasklist
commands.title: tasklist — Daftar Proses
commands.description: Menampilkan semua proses yang sedang berjalan. Setara dengan ps di Linux.
commands.examples:
# List semua proses
tasklist

# Dengan detail
tasklist /v

# Format CSV
tasklist /fo csv > proses.csv

# Filter: cari proses tertentu
tasklist /fi "imagename eq chrome.exe"
tasklist /fi "memusage gt 100000"
tasklist /fi "status eq not responding"

# Tampilkan services
tasklist /svc

# PowerShell: Get-Process
Get-Process
Get-Process chrome
Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 10

commands.name: taskkill
commands.title: taskkill — Menghentikan Proses
commands.description: Menghentikan proses berdasarkan nama atau PID. Setara dengan kill di Linux.
commands.examples:
# Kill berdasarkan nama
taskkill /im notepad.exe

# Force kill berdasarkan PID
taskkill /pid 1234 /f

# Kill termasuk child processes
taskkill /im chrome.exe /f /t

# Kill proses not responding
taskkill /fi "status eq not responding" /f

# PowerShell: Stop-Process
Stop-Process -Name notepad
Stop-Process -Id 1234 -Force
Get-Process chrome | Stop-Process
commands.warning: Menghentikan proses system bisa menyebabkan crash atau restart. Hati-hati dengan svchost.exe dan proses system lainnya.

commands.name: start-win
commands.title: start — Menjalankan Program
commands.description: Menjalankan program, file, atau URL di window/proses terpisah.
commands.examples:
# Buka file
start document.docx

# Buka URL
start https://google.com

# Buka folder di Explorer
start .
start C:\Users

# Jalankan dengan prioritas tinggi
start /high program.exe

# Tunggu selesai
start /wait installer.exe

# PowerShell: Start-Process
Start-Process notepad
Start-Process -FilePath program.exe -Wait
Start-Process -FilePath cmd -Verb RunAs

commands.name: wmic-process
commands.title: wmic process — Info Proses Detail
commands.description: Menampilkan informasi detail proses menggunakan WMI.
commands.examples:
# List ringkas
wmic process list brief

# Info proses tertentu
wmic process where name="chrome.exe" get processid,commandline

# Kill proses via WMI
wmic process where name="app.exe" delete

# PowerShell: Get-CimInstance
Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Select Name, ProcessId, CommandLine

commands.name: performance-ps
commands.title: Performance Monitoring (PowerShell)
commands.description: Cmdlet PowerShell untuk monitoring performa sistem.
commands.examples:
# CPU usage
Get-Counter '\Processor(_Total)\% Processor Time'

# Memory
Get-Counter '\Memory\Available MBytes'

# Monitoring 10 detik
Get-Counter '\Processor(_Total)\% Processor Time' -SampleInterval 2 -MaxSamples 5

# Top CPU processes
Get-Process | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name, CPU, WorkingSet

# Memory per proses (MB)
Get-Process | Select-Object Name, @{N='MemMB';E={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet/1MB,2)}} | Sort-Object MemMB -Descending | Select-Object -First 10
